evals.expected_output: Changelog from committed git history using commit-classifier.py; raw commits rewritten for users; breaking changes called out.
assertions: Only committed history; no uncommitted changes.

evals.expected_output: User-facing release notes for the version; cites specific commits.
assertions: Version bump cites evidence from commits.

evals.prompt: create a feature branch and commit the changes
evals.expected_output: Out of scope for git ops; routes to git-workflow.
assertions: Does not perform branch or commit ops.

evals.expected_output: Migration guide with before/after examples for each breaking change.
Uses best-effort heuristics for non-conventional commits and flags uncertainty.
